headline: Robinhood’s RVII Tests Retail Demand For Private Markets And HOOD Valuation
summary: Robinhood Markets (NasdaqGS:HOOD) is launching its second retail focused venture fund, RVII, aimed at giving individual investors access to early stage and growth stage private companies. The new fund targets private market opportunities that have typically been available mainly to accredited or institutional investors. RVII represents a further expansion of Robinhood’s product lineup beyond its core trading app. Robinhood Markets, trading at around $78.27, has delivered mixed returns...
